case_title: MIRANDA, JULIO I. VS VICEVICH, NELSON I.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY MIRANDA, JULIO I. AS TO DEFENDANT VICEVICH, NELSON I. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VICEVICH, NELSON I.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, JULIO I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VICEVICH, NELSON I. $2,529.20 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,649.20, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIM ONLY, AND DOES NOT INCLUDE ANY POST TRIAL CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY.
